runners.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (25.30) at this track in a Grade 4/5. Has first look at box 1 this time. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (25.30) at this track in a Grade 4/5. Has first look at box 1 this time. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (30.51) at Geelong over 520m. Has run a slick time here with a 25.25 PB at the distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (30.51) at Geelong over 520m. Has run a slick time here with a 25.25 PB at the distance. Worth including.

runners.formComment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.75 lengths in a Mix 3/4 last start at The Meadows, clocking a fast 30.09 over the 525m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.75 lengths in a Mix 3/4 last start at The Meadows, clocking a fast 30.09 over the 525m trip. Rates a top chance again if runs up to latest.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 390m (22.30) beating Aston Torta in Grade 4/5 on April 8. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 390m (22.30) beating Aston Torta in Grade 4/5 on April 8. Hard to have this time.

runners.formComment: Turned in another winning performance after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Shepparton over 450m (25.21). Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in another winning performance after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Shepparton over 450m (25.21). Looks well placed and should feature.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 515m at Sandown. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 515m at Sandown. Prefer in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Stumbled at box rise.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 400m at Warragul, beaten 4 lengths (23.06) behind Paw Quark in a Grade 5 on April 7. Prepared to risk this time.
